prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on aniline (C₆H₅NH₂, 14 atoms, charge 0, multiplicity 1) performed with DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', density-fit RKS) using PySCF, in the gas phase. The input geometry was taken as-is from the supplied .xyz file (no re-optimization at this level). The SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings were reported. The engine's integrity.trustworthy flag is true.

Results:
  HOMO (index 24): −5.553772 eV
  LUMO (index 25): −0.2489544 eV
  HOMO–LUMO gap:    5.3048177 eV  ← headline value

Koopmans descriptors:
  Vertical IP:            5.5538 eV
  Vertical EA:            0.2490 eV
  Electronegativity (χ):  2.9014 eV
  Chemical hardness (η):  2.6524 eV
  Chemical softness (S):  0.3770 eV⁻¹
  Electrophilicity (ω):   1.5868 eV

No warnings were reported by the engine (warnings array is empty). These are Koopmans-style orbital-energy gaps, not excitation energies.
